channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump taps federal prosecutor Jay Clayton for director of national intelligence role
item.description: President Trump announced Thursday he is nominating former SEC chairman and current U.S. Attorney for the Southern District of New York Jay Clayton for the role of director of national intelligence.

item.title: First reactions to 'Toy Story 5' have been released
item.description: Initial reviews for 'Toy Story 5' are overwhelmingly positive, with critics describing it as emotional, funny, warm, and flawless.

item.title: Suspect in killing of Minnesota lawmaker and her husband expected to change plea
Trump selects Jay Clayton for director of national intelligence
item.description: President Donald Trump announced Thursday a new permanent nominee to lead the Office of the Director of National Intelligence: Jay Clayton.
